I finish the dishes and then find myself walking down the hallway towards her room to make sure she’s alright. She’s in here, alright. My eyes widen as I take in the sight in front of me. She did not in fact take a shower, she’s in the bathtub. The same spot I found her the first night she moved into the penthouse. “Peyton,” I say through a strangled breath. You know what she does?
